# KOSTIN Parfums - robots.txt
# Allow all search engines and SEO tools

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Disallow non-canonical / utility pages
Disallow: /cart
Disallow: /checkout
Disallow: /checkout-success
Disallow: /order-success
Disallow: /profile
Disallow: /auth
Disallow: /verify
Disallow: /verify-order
Disallow: /verify-email
Disallow: /guest-cancel-order
Disallow: /admin

# Explicitly allow SEO crawlers
User-agent: SemrushBot
Allow: /

User-agent: AhrefsBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /
